overview.short: St. Joseph Shrine, Panagudi is a much-loved spiritual town in Tamil Nadu, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Joseph Shrine, Panagudi is a shrine dedicated to Saint Joseph under the Diocese of Tuticorin in Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Panagudi
topPlaces.description: Panagudi is a special grade townpanchayat in the Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.it is biggest towns in thirunelveli district and fastest growing town in thirunelveli district Panagudi is known for its wind farms, the Pathini energy drink (from palm trees), brick production, clay tiles, climatic conditions and scenic views.

topPlaces.name: ISRO Propulsion Complex
topPlaces.description: The ISRO Propulsion Complex (IPRC), located at Mahendragiri in Tamil Nadu, is an ISRO centre involved in testing, assembling, and integrating propulsion systems and stages that are developed at ISRO's Liquid Propulsion Systems Centres (LPSC). Formerly, IPRC was known as LPSC, Mahendragiri, functioning under LPSC. It was elevated as an independent centre and renamed as IPRC with effect from 1 February 2014.

topPlaces.name: Kavalkinaru
topPlaces.description: Kavalkinaru is a village panchayat in the Tirunelveli district of Tamil Nadu. It is located 24 km (15 Miles) from Nagercoil, 69 km (43 Miles) from Tirunelveli, and 99 km from Trivandrum International Airport.

topPlaces.name: Thalakulam
topPlaces.description: Thalakulam is a village situated on Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Veppilankulam
topPlaces.description: Veppilankulam, also known as Vembai, is a village panchayat of Veppilankulam in Radhapuram taluk in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamilnadu.

topPlaces.name: Vadakkankulam
topPlaces.description: Vadakkankulam is a small town in Radhapuram Taluka, Tirunelveli District of Tamil Nadu state, India. It was the home of S. A. Raja.

topPlaces.name: Muppandal
topPlaces.description: Muppandal is a small village on the southern tip of India in Kanyakumari District, in the state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in a hilly region where wind from the Arabian Sea gusts through mountain passes.

topPlaces.name: Muppandal Wind Farm
topPlaces.description: The Muppandal Wind Farm, located in Muppandal, Kanyakumari district, Tamil Nadu, is India's largest operational onshore wind farm. The project was developed by Tamil Nadu Energy Development Agency.

items.note: Panagudi is a special grade townpanchayat in the Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.it is biggest towns in thirunelveli district and fastest growing town in thirunelveli district Panagudi is known for its wind farms, the Pathini energy drink (from palm trees), brick production, clay tiles, climatic conditions and scenic views.

The ISRO Propulsion Complex (IPRC), located at Mahendragiri in Tamil Nadu, is an ISRO centre involved in testing, assembling, and integrating propulsion systems and stages that are developed at ISRO's Liquid Propulsion Systems Centres (LPSC). Formerly, IPRC was known as LPSC, Mahendragiri, functioning under LPSC. It was elevated as an independent centre and renamed as IPRC with effect from 1 February 2014.

Kavalkinaru is a village panchayat in the Tirunelveli district of Tamil Nadu. It is located 24 km (15 Miles) from Nagercoil, 69 km (43 Miles) from Tirunelveli, and 99 km from Trivandrum International Airport.
Thalakulam is a village situated on Kanniyakumari district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Veppilankulam, also known as Vembai, is a village panchayat of Veppilankulam in Radhapuram taluk in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamilnadu.
Vadakkankulam is a small town in Radhapuram Taluka, Tirunelveli District of Tamil Nadu state, India. It was the home of S. A. Raja.

Muppandal is a small village on the southern tip of India in Kanyakumari District, in the state of Tamil Nadu. It is located in a hilly region where wind from the Arabian Sea gusts through mountain passes.
The Muppandal Wind Farm, located in Muppandal, Kanyakumari district, Tamil Nadu, is India's largest operational onshore wind farm. The project was developed by Tamil Nadu Energy Development Agency.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Joseph Shrine, Panagudi?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Joseph Shrine, Panagudi is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Joseph Shrine, Panagudi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (75 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (71 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Joseph Shrine, Panagudi?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Joseph Shrine, Panagudi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Joseph Shrine, Panagudi?
faq.a: Stays in St. Joseph Shrine, Panagudi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Joseph Shrine, Panagudi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Panagudi, ISRO Propulsion Complex, Kavalkinaru, Thalakulam, Veppilankulam.
